arts.sum: Blackpool might be six points behind the playoffs, but their game in hand means they remain very much in the picture. But the Seasiders will most likely have to win all of their four remaining games ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Blackpool vs. Wrexham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Blackpool and Wrexham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
